Hero.description: Orchestrate specialized AI agents in a structured, self-hosting AI workflow. Building with @aiagentflow/cli provides a powerful AI task flow configuration that keeps your code local and your engineering team productive.

Terminal.step1: $ aiagentflow run "Build a REST API for user auth"
Terminal.step4: Task: Build a REST API for user auth

Pipeline.description: Our specialized agents handle the entire software development lifecycle, from gathering requirements to writing tests, ensuring high-quality output every time.

step1.title: Analyze & Plan
step1.description: The Architect Agent reads your prompt, analyzes the codebase, and drafts a comprehensive implementation plan.

step2.title: Write Code
step2.description: The Coder Agent follows the plan, writing clean, maintainable code across your full stack.

step3.title: Review
step3.description: The Reviewer Agent inspects the code for bugs, security issues, and style guide adherence.

step4.title: Test & Validate
step4.description: The Tester Agent writes unit tests and the Judge validates that the code meets all initial requirements.

Features.description: Stop wrestling with bloated frameworks. AI Agent Flow gives you the self-hosting AI workflow and AI task flow configuration primitives you need to ship software faster, right from your terminal.

feature1.title: Local First
feature1.description: Your code, your rules. No cloud lock-in or sending proprietary architecture to third-party orchestration servers.

feature2.title: Framework Agnostic
feature2.description: Works with React, Vue, Svelte, Node, Python, and more. If you can code it, our agents can orchestrate it.

feature3.title: Predictable Output
feature3.description: By separating concerns (Architect vs Coder vs Reviewer), you eliminate massive context hallucinations and get reliable results.

feature4.title: Self-Correcting
feature4.description: Built-in Judge and Tester agents automatically retry failed tests and fix syntax errors before returning control to you.

feature5.title: Extensible
feature5.description: Write custom agents or modify existing prompts. The entire framework is designed to be molded to your team's specific workflow.

feature6.title: Streaming & Auto-Detection
feature6.description: Use the --stream flag to watch agents code in real-time. Automatically detect available models from Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, and Ollama out-of-the-box.

Demo.description: Whether you prefer writing code or using the CLI, AI Agent Flow adapts seamlessly to your tooling preferences.

feature.label: New Feature
feature.request: Create a dynamic pricing table component
feature.cli:
# Initialize your project
aiagentflow init

# Run a task with streaming
aiagentflow run "Create a dynamic pricing table component" --stream

# Check provider health
aiagentflow doctor

bugfix.label: Bug Fix
bugfix.request: Fix race condition in auth middleware when handling concurrent login requests
bugfix.cli: aiagentflow run "Fix race condition in auth middleware when handling concurrent login requests" \\\n    --stream \\\n    --auto \\\n    --context src/middleware/auth.ts

refactor.label: Refactor
refactor.request: Refactor UserService to use async/await and implement the repository pattern
refactor.cli: aiagentflow run "Refactor UserService to use async/await and implement the repository pattern" \\\n    --stream \\\n    --auto

Install.description: Add AI Agent Flow to any Node.js project. It brings its own zero-dependency engine, so you won't break your existing toolchain.

Providers.headline: Compatible with the models you love

anthropic.title: Anthropic (Claude)
anthropic.description: State-of-the-art reasoning for architecture and complex coding tasks. Optimized for claude-sonnet-4-20250514.

openai.title: OpenAI (GPT-4o)
openai.description: Lighting fast token generation for rapid code execution and complex agent routing.

gemini.title: Google Gemini
gemini.description: Access enormous context windows for scanning massive codebases effortlessly with Gemini 2.5 Pro.

ollama.title: Ollama (Local Models)
ollama.description: Keep everything 100% private. Run Llama 3 or DeepSeek models locally without any API costs.

Community.headline: Built for the community, by the community
Community.description: AI Agent Flow is MIT licensed and thrives on contributions. Join hundreds of developers building the future of autonomous engineering.

Footer.description: The open-source multi-agent orchestration framework for software engineering. Built by developers, for developers.
Footer.allRightsReserved: AI Agent Flow Contributors. All rights reserved.
